Container.Name: WolfNet
Container.Overview: WolfNet is a secure private mesh VPN that creates encrypted tunnels between your servers using X25519 key exchange and ChaCha20-Poly1305 encryption. No WireGuard kernel module needed. Join your Unraid server to your WolfStack cluster overlay network.
Container.Description: WolfNet creates a secure encrypted mesh network between your servers. Run on Unraid to join your WolfStack cluster. No WireGuard kernel module required — fully userspace crypto.

Config.Name: Join Token
Config.Description: Invite token from 'wolfnet invite' on an existing node

Config.Name: WolfNet IP
Config.Description: Override auto-assigned IP (leave empty for auto)

Config.Name: Gateway Mode
Config.Description: Enable NAT gateway for other WolfNet nodes
